title: AvalonBay Suddenly Becomes A Bargain
text: AvalonBay has lost about 20% since its peak a month ago. Dividend is now in line with medium and long-term U.S. Treasury bond yields.

title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Declares Second Quarter 2022 Dividends
text: ARLINGTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) announced today that its Board of Directors declared a cash dividend on the Company's Common Stock (par value $0.01 per share) for the second quarter of 2022. The Common Stock dividend is $1.59 per share and is payable July 15, 2022, to all Common Stockholders of Record as of June 30, 2022. About AvalonBay Communities, Inc. title: This Region Is Driving Scorching Rent Growth for These Apartment REITs
text: Rents are rising fast across the country, especially in the south.
